result:
Understood — staying in plan mode. The read-only review is complete and delivered above (full JSON report in the plan file at `C:\Users\ekzarov\.claude\plans\you-are-a-fresh-splendid-stream.md`).

**Bottom line:**
- **Result: `BLOCKED` (with findings)** — I do not infer approval, and per the constitution/review protocol a blocked pass cannot be recorded as partial-clean.
- **Completed read-only** and independently verified: inventory counts (27 SDD artifacts + 2 indexes, 23 decisions D-001..D-023, 28 simulator tests), git checks (revision `c710d1d`, clean tree, clean `diff --check`), all SDD/traceability/decision/simulator/tooling/methodology text analysis, yielding findings **M1–M4** and **L1–L5** (which stand regardless of the block). The specifically-flagged item "total credit-provider failure before persistence" is **confirmed honest** in the simulator.
- **Blocked** (fail-closed, uninstalled deps + gated `unzip`/exec under plan mode): the three `npm` audits, simulator test *execution*, and the entire binary-workbook verification — including the flagged **runtime labels, row 32, and lifecycle banner/legend**, plus Rev 1 and workbook-side D-consistency/reverse-traceability.

Whenever you want the blocked subchecks finished, approve exiting plan mode (or grant `npm`/`unzip` permissions) and I'll install deps, run all gates + simulator tests, parse the workbook, re-confirm M1–M4/L1–L5 against live output, and produce the final `analysis/reviews/stage-06-pass-010.md`. I've left the review untouched and made no project-file changes.

questions.question: This session is in plan mode, but the Pass 010 task requires running non-read-only gates (npm ci + audits + simulator tests). How should I proceed?

options.label: Exit plan mode & execute
options.description: I present a short execution plan via ExitPlanMode; once approved I install deps and run all gates/tests, then deliver the full JSON review report with actual gate results. Fullest fidelity to the Pass 010 task.

options.label: Read-only now, gates BLOCKED
options.description: Stay in plan mode. I do the complete read-only review (all artifacts, workbook XML parse, simulator static analysis, git checks) and mark the executable gates as BLOCKED subchecks, per the protocol's blocked-scope handling.

options.label: Just produce a review plan
options.description: Treat this literally as planning: I write a plan describing how Pass 010 would be executed, without performing the verification itself.

Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead('C:\Work\Legacy\z-bank-pass010-review\analysis\legacy_user_flows.xlsx')
$zip.Entries | Select-Object FullName, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize
$zip.Dispose()

Cross-check row counts between coverage.json and traceability

tool_input.plan:
# Stage 6 Pass 010 — Fresh Independent Review (report + finalize plan)

## Context

I was invoked as a fresh, independent Stage 6 Pass 010 reviewer for Bank of Z,
read-only at immutable revision `c710d1d`. The task asks for a full non-sampled
verification and a JSON-compatible report with a final CLEAN/FINDINGS/BLOCKED
verdict.

This session is running under **plan mode** (read-only enforced) and the repo's
`node_modules` are **absent** for both `analysis/tools` and `simulation`.
Consequently the executable gates (`npm ci` + the three audits + simulator
tests) and the binary-workbook parse (`unzip` / .NET) are gated and could not be
run. I completed the entire text-artifact review read-only, independently
verified the material findings, and enumerated the exact scope that remains
BLOCKED for an eligible fresh session with dependency install + workbook render.

The report below is the deliverable. The final section is the concrete
execution plan needed to convert the BLOCKED subchecks to a completed pass.

---

## REVIEW REPORT (JSON-compatible plain text)

    "workbook_detail_rows_claimed": {"value": 135, "basis": "coverage.json per-slice sum 19+20+21+20+6+7+8+8+26=135; traceability.md:78; stage-05-sdd-report.md:43", "independently_verified_against_xlsx": false, "note": "BLOCKED: binary workbook not parseable read-only"},

Feature 001 FR-002/013/014 and Feature 006 FR-010 have NO feature-specific row mapping, yet the audit still reports 'SDD AUDIT OK' because those FR strings occur for other features. Cannot confirm the 28 PASS (execution BLOCKED)."}

Used consistently; confirm intentional."},

No hard overclaim of real IBM-runtime verification found."},

---

## Plan to finalize (convert BLOCKED subchecks to a completed pass)

To complete Pass 010 properly, the following must run (they require leaving
plan mode so dependency install + archive/exec commands are permitted):

1. `npm --prefix analysis/tools ci` then `npm run audit`, `audit:sdd`,
   `audit:evidence` — capture exact stdout + exit codes; require `AUDIT OK` /
   `SDD AUDIT OK`.
2. `cd simulation && npm ci && npm test` — confirm all 28 tests PASS.
3. Parse `analysis/legacy_user_flows.xlsx` (exceljs or unzip the sheet XML) and
   independently verify: 135 detail rows + 12 epics; every runtime evidence
   label (re-check M3 for any wrongly-downgraded/garbled label); row 32;
   row-2 lifecycle banner + row-4 legend text against workbook-audit.js:40-49;
   Rev 1 sheet; workbook-side D-001..D-023 and row->FR reverse traceability.
4. Re-confirm M1-M4/L1-L5 against live gate output; write the immutable report
   to `analysis/reviews/stage-06-pass-010.md` per the review template and append
   the pass to `analysis/migration_status.yaml` (owner action, not inferred).

Read-only findings already recorded (M1-M4, L1-L5) stand and should be carried
into that final report regardless of the gate outcomes.
